name: titanium dioxide
description: White pigment used to provide color and opacity to food products
raw_text: Crunch Cake: ENRICHED WHEAT FLOUR BLEACHED (FLOUR BLEACHED (FLOUR, NIACIN, IRON THIAMINE MONONITRATE, RIBOFLAVIN, FOLIC ACID), SUGAR, EGGS, SOYBEAN OIL, WATER, MANGO, FOOD STARCH-MODIFIED (CORN), DEXTROSE, LEAVENING (SODIUM ALUMINUM PHOSPHATE, BAKING SODA, MONOCALCIUM | Pudding Cake: Sugar, powdered sugar, water, corn starch, corn syrup, high fructose corn syrup, food starch - modified, agar, guar gum, potassium sorbate (as preservative), citric acid, honey, pectin, phosphoric acid, sodium benzoate (as preservative), dextrose, natural and artificial flavor, maltodextrin, carrageenan, locust bean gum, dextrin, lemon peel, lemon puree, lemon juice concentrate, yellow 5, ascorbic | Happy easter fun n' games double crisp candy: Sugar, partially hydrogenated vegetable oil (palm kernel, palm, soybean and/or cottonseed), whey, crisp rice (rice, sugar, salt, barley malt), cocoa, lactose, skim milk, milk, soy lecithin (emulsifier), vanillin ( artificial flavor), u.s. certified colors (fd&c blue #1, blue #2, red #40, yellow #5 and yellow #6 lake; and red #3).
